The most you guys know that the way we grew ClickFunnels, we used a lot of them types of funnels, but the primary way, especially initially, to get us from zero to 10,000 customers, was 100% through webinar funnels. We just had one funnel and we perfected it and we did over and over and over and over and over again. If you read the expert secrets book, the original version, I go through D, but how we did it and how it worked and the process. And basically, we did a webinar at least once a week, every single week. So the whole week, filling the webinar, we did the webinar, we closed it out and we kept doing that process over and over and over again. I still think if I was to start a new company from scratch, the very first funnel I would focus on is webinar funnel. That'd be the very first thing I would do immediately to get started. I think the majority of people come to my world today. I can wrestle, I learn about all the funnels. Which one should I do first? Most of you guys, this is the one I'd recommend you do first. Not everybody. If you're selling physical products, I probably would start with the webinar, but if you're selling any type of information products, any type of coaching, consulting, all those kind of things, webinar funnel is still my favorite. So take that for what it's worth. All right, webinar funnel. So this is what a basic webinar funnel looks like. It's very simple and very basic. There's a page people register. There's a thank you page, thank you for registering. Then they actually have the webinar that happens somewhere and then at the end of the webinar, you sell them your offer. Okay, there's an order form. That's kind of it. It's very simple and very easy. Right? So for example, this is the webinar funnel, the Bill Click Funnels. Okay, it's not difficult. It's not complicated. But there's some strategy to understand it. Again, there's the framework and then the things we weave into the framework. So let me walk you through that. So you saw the framework, let me walk you through the art that goes into it. Okay? So the first is the registration page. Now a couple of things on the registration page. The more curiosity you weave into the registration page, the higher your registration rate will be. Okay? Listen to how much curiosity is in this headline. My weird niche funnel is currently making me $17,947 per day and how to ethically knock it off in less than 10 minutes. Okay, my weird niche funnel, that causes curiosity, is currently making 17 grand a day? Like what? 15 grand a day and how to ethically knock it off? How do you ethically knock something off? It makes no logical sense whatsoever. You're doing less than 10 minutes. There's so much curiosity. Even the image, why is Russell like, hang loose? What's he doing? He's holding a web page. It's just weird, right? There's so much curiosity. You're like, I don't know what this is, but I need to register. Okay? So this is what we used to launch ClickFunnels and I was doing this webinar, honestly, it was three to five times a week during the first four or five months of ClickFunnels. And we got down to like two times a week and then by the end we were doing once a week. And this is what we got from zero to first 10,000 members was by me doing this webinar over and over and over and over again. Okay? That was a hook that got people in. Okay? So that's page number one. Now if they'd registered, then the next page is our thank you page. We say thank you so much for registering. The webinar is happening Tuesday. It's happening Friday, whatever that thing might be. Okay? Here I have to give them reminders. Like don't forget, put on your calendar, like all the things they're not going to forget about the webinar. Okay? And then the next thing you can do here is you can, there's a couple of different methodologies, but basically it's like you can make them an offer on thank you page. If the webinar is not for two more days, like what do you give this gap right now? What if you create something that you put on thank you page that you could then sell to get, to recoup the advertising costs that you spent to get someone to buy here? Okay? Sometimes call us a self-liquidating offer. So I got put an offer here like, hey, before you come to the webinar, go buy this $20 e-book that's going to help you understand blah. It's going to help you when you get on the webinar, right? Something like that. So this is a great spot where you can sell something. What we did when we launched ClickFunnels is we told people go get a two free trial. The registered for webinars, the webinar is coming up. To prepare for the webinar, go get a free trial of the ClickFunnels and just try it out. And so we got people to go and create an account here and create their account ClickFunnels before they came. And I also said, get an account ClickFunnels and buy your dot com stickers book. So by getting everyone to register for webinar, we should have pushed them to the next steps in our value ladder. Be a free trial, go buy my book and get them into the buying process. So that's kind of what happens. Registration page, thank you page. Now inside ClickFunnels, we don't have software that actually runs the webinar. So the ones that we typically use either go to webinar or Zoom are two amazing webinar platforms and they integrate into ClickFunnels. So if you look at page number one, this page right here, this is built in ClickFunnels, and I integrated either go to webinar or Zoom into this funnel. So when someone clicks on it, they put the email address in it. It goes and creates the webinar inside of Zoom or go to webinar. So then what happens now is then when the webinar happens Thursday at two or whenever you're doing it, boom, they log in to go to webinar, log into Zoom, and there's a live video of you doing your presentation. And that's it. So this is an example of a go to webinar that me and Jim Edwards did where we were selling funnel scripts. It's just a live presentation of us selling our thing. Now I'm wondering, Russell, what do I say to this presentation? Well, let me guess. You should guess. You're going to do this. You're going to tell your epiphany story about why you came out of this thing, why it's so exciting. You're going to tell your origin story at the very beginning, your first push to the big domino. They're going to tell you the story about your vehicle, about internal beliefs, your external beliefs, and you're going to do the stack and the close. Literally perfect webinar 101. You're going to go watch that training and read the extra stickers book, master it, and that's the presentation you give. And if you do that, you do the right, all dominoes will follow. On the end of the webinar, they're going to rush to the order form to give you money. And one big thing to understand, we tested this like crazy. On the order form, you don't want to go and do long form cells that are re-explaining everything. I've seen more people talk someone out of a cell that are order form than anything else. If they go to your order form, they are ready to buy. All you do is you just let them buy. That's it. I just have a recap. Here's everything you're getting in the offer. Here's a picture of it. Give me your credit card. It's just very simple, very easy. I'm not trying to go and make this more complicated than that. And then in the webinar funnel, after it's live, we usually put up a replay page. It was a simple page and click funnel, it was a replay page. And we usually will give them some urgency and scarcity. Like, hey, this replay is going to be up for two days. Go check it out. I have a couple emails talking about urgency and scarcity. This page, we're pulling the replay down in 24 hours, in 12 hours, and three hours, it's gone, and then that pushes people through the cycle of urgency and scarcity. That's basically how the webinar funnel works. And I said, that's how we build click funnels. It was interesting as if you look at the year one of click funnels, when the year ended, we had 10,000 members in click funnels. And what happens, we had about 2,500 people who bought click funnels from the webinar. We had a 1,000-dollar version back then. 2,500 people bought from the webinar. And from that, remember on the thank you page, I told people to go get a free trial? For every person that bought the 1,000-dollar version of click funnels, what was the number? Three people stuck on the trial. So the end of year one, we had 2,500 people pay 1,000 bucks, and we had 7,500 people who were on trial paying $97 a month. And that was the foundation of how we built and launched and grew click funnels. So that's why webinar funnels are so powerful. Now there's a variation for those of you guys who either have a webinar presentation that's killing it, or you don't want to do live webinars, which I can go on and rant on another day. You should do live webinar at least 100 times before you automate it. But when you're ready, you can create an automated webinar funnel, which is very similar to some different intricacies. So basically, the way an auto webinar funnel works is someone registers, and then the webinar actually happens in click funnels. It's a video presentation of your webinar that happens on click funnels, and if they're pushed in the order form. It's very simple. So for example, this is our funnel scripts webinar. We did it live, Jim Edwards and I did it live initially through a regular webinar funnel. Then when it was done, we took that presentation that was recorded, it converted great, and we put it here. So we made a webinar registration page. And notice this one saying, hey, the webinar is starting today at 10.30 AM. So you got eight minutes before it starts. Come register, they register it, and it takes them the next page. Oh, and then here's another variation. This is our secretfunnelstrategy.com. Same thing, we got a webinar right here. They register for it, and they get a 48-hour pass. It says, you can register, you got 48 hours to watch this presentation. And then boom, it takes them to the actual broadcast room, where basically it's the webinar video embedded on the page. This is me and Jim doing our webinar on the page. This is me at the 10X growth con doing my presentation. Video is embedded on the page, and they're both there. Now a couple things you'll notice, they're kind of fun on the 10X secrets one on the right hand side. One is notice down below below the video what we did. It says 10X growth conference, timestamps. I have all these timestamps in there. Does that look like anything to you guys? This is a modified video spoiler box. It's me taking bullet points of all the important things that happen throughout the presentation. All the little hooks that I can use to grab something in there. So this is timestamp. At 1 minute 53, I'm going to show you how to instantly outspend your competitors and capture more potential customers in your market. Number two, at 11 minutes, 22 seconds, you're going to learn that the life you want, the marriage you want, the family you want, is going to be fueled by the businesses you build, and so on and so forth. So I have all these little hooks down there in a little modified video spoiler box to get them to watch the presentation. I've known all of my presentations, but we did hear it's working great. I also, this one, have little buttons that says read transcripts. And the click on there opens up a new page where someone can take, we took the whole presentation, made a huge long sales letter, and they can read it. So I have a version for my people like video and my version for people who like to read text. And I have people who literally will come here and they'll download the transcripts, print them out, and they'll read them on their page, you know, read them like a newspaper and circle things, and then that gets them to go and buy. So I have both modalities there. Okay? So I understand like you don't have to do all these things, like most of my funnels, I don't have a video and the transcripts and the video spoiler box. Those are the art that I'm weaving into the funnel framework. Okay? Because the funnel framework is simple. Registration page, page where we actually show the presentation and then order form. Okay? But I'm just weaving in my art. I just want to show you both of these because they're similar, but they're both different as well. Okay? And then here's the order form. Again, order form simple. There's no like me reselling it's just saying here's a recap of all the things you're going to get and then here's what you put in your credit card. Okay? And then obviously after some registers, we have email sequences that push them to go watch the webinar. We have urgency and scarcity. We gave them a 48 hour pass after 48 hours, then 24 hours, then 12 hours, and three hours, and then from there we pull the webinar presentation down for them. Okay? So email sequences moving through emotion and logic and fear, urgency and scarcity. Okay? So those are the different webinar funnels.
